LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT PACE SUPPLY CORPORATION'S MOTION CONTESTING PLAINTIFF FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON INCOM MECHANICAL'S MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT INCOM MECHANICAL, INC.'S MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION IS GRANTED. INCOM MECHANICAL, INC. HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT THE SETTLEMENT IS IN GOOD FAITH PER TECH-BILT AND PACE SUPPLY CORPORATION HAS NOT MET ITS BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW OTHERWISE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PACE SUPPLY CORPORATION'S Motion Contesting Plaintiff Fireman'S Fund Insurance Company's Application For Good Faith Settlement Determination is Off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on Incom Mechanical's motion for good faith settlement. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN R. MYERS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF JOSEPH COSTELLA & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (925) 945-4491 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT INCOM MECHANICAL, INCORPORATED;
ATTY. CORRY MCCARTHY, TEL. NO. (916) 817-6300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PACE SUPPLY CORPORATION BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT INCOM MECHANICAL, INC.'s Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination is Granted. Incom Mechanical, Inc. has demonstrated that the settlement is in good faith per Tech-Bilt and Pace Supply Corporation has not met its burden of proof to show otherwise. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
